backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, services, Stripe payments, and access-controlled admin operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (online consultation page, video call UI, chat panel, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key contents of pages, components, hooks, and config files in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jeevan HealthCare React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration registering all application routes (public pages, admin, phlebotomist, doctor portals, and new consultation/tracking pages) under a shared Layout root route with a React Query client provider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a sidebar navigation and access control, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users and rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentRemin: React component that schedules and displays appointment reminder toasts at 24-hour, 3-hour, and 1-hour intervals before a given appointment time, and conditionally shows a 'Join Video Call' button 15 minutes before online consultations.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the doctor portal shell with sidebar navigation and role-based access control, showing an access-denied card if the user lacks the doctor role.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Renders a doctor listing card with avatar, star rating, consultation mode badges, availability indicator, and a 'Book Now' button using MockDoctor data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer displaying the Jeevan HealthCare brand, quick navigation links, service links, and contact details with social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart badge, and Internet Identity-based auth with role-based dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the phlebotomist portal shell with a sidebar and access control, redirecting users who are not authenticated or lack the phlebotomist role.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects name, email, and phone from newly authenticated users and saves a patient UserProfile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SlotCalendar.tsx: Interactive monthly calendar component for selecting appointment dates, disabling past dates and supporting month navigation.
frontend/src/components/SlotLockTimer.ts: Displays a countdown timer showing how long a selected appointment slot is held, with urgent styling when under 60 seconds remain.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Renders an accordion UI listing 16 medical specialty categories (e.g., Primary Care, Cardiology) with their specialists. Clicking a specialist triggers an optional callback and navigates to a search route.
frontend/src/components/TimeSlotGrid.tsx: Displays a grid of 30-minute appointment time slots from 9 AM to 7 PM, with states for unavailable, locked, selected, and available slots based on the selected date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control if a token is present, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with persistence for managing a shopping cart of lab tests and packages, exposing add, remove, clear, and price calculation methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering services, user profiles, admin/role checks, bookings, doctor data, and more. Each hook uses `useActor` to obtain the actor and enables queries only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlotLock.ts: Custom hook that manages a 5-minute countdown lock on a selected time slot, providing `lockSlot`, `clearLock`, `lockedSlot`, and `remainingSeconds` state. Uses an interval ref to tick down and auto-clear the lock on expiry or unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS layers and defines CSS custom properties for the Jeevan brand color palette in both light and dark modes. Also adds utility classes for brand-specific text, background, and border colors.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Exports a `MOCK_DOCTORS` array of static doctor objects with fields like specialty, experience, rating, consultation fee, and availability, used as shared mock data across doctor-related pages. Also defines the `MockDoctor` TypeScript interface.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app into the DOM, wrapping it with `QueryClientProvider` for React Query and `InternetIdentityProvider` for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, story, and core values using cards and icons. Content is hardcoded with sections for hero, mission/vision, story, and values grid.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: Admin CRM page for managing sales leads with status tracking (new, contacted, in-progress, converted, lost), lead creation/editing dialogs, filtering, and follow-up management.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: Admin page for managing customers with search, add/edit/delete operations via backend mutations, and a details dialog showing associated patients per customer.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Displays an admin dashboard with six metric cards (total orders, active orders, completed orders, total users, phlebotomists, pending reports) fetched via the useDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Lists all customer bookings fetched via useAllBookings, displaying each order's address, description, preferred date, budget, and urgency status in cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: Full CRUD admin page for managing patients, supporting search, add/edit/delete dialogs, and viewing patient vitals, using hooks for patients, customers, and vitals data.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Displays a static list of mock test reports with verified/pending status badges and buttons to view or verify each report.
Shows all diagnostic services/packages fetched via useAllServices in a grid of cards, displaying name, active status, category, and description.
Lists all system users fetched via useListAllUsers in cards, showing each user's name, email, role (with icon), and active status.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals with search/filter, add/edit/delete support, and status indicators (normal, moderate, critical) using vitals and patients query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Displays a booking confirmation summary after a successful appointment booking, including doctor details, date/time, fee, and options to start online consultation or track a home visit doctor.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step lab test booking form collecting patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submits the booking and clears the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/BookSlotPage.tsx: Page for selecting an appointment date and time slot for a specific doctor, with slot locking timer and navigation to patient details form. Reads consultation type and fee from query params.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the user's lab test/package cart with item removal, pricing breakdown (MRP vs discounted price), and a checkout button that navigates to the booking page.
Allows users to select a consultation type (online, clinic, or home visit) for a doctor, calculates the total fee with corporate/subscription discounts and travel fees, then navigates to the slot booking page.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with cards displaying phone, WhatsApp, email, address, and hours information, plus social media links and an embedded Google Map.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Displays doctor performance analytics including completed consultations, average rating, total patients, and success rate using stats fetched via useDoctorDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Manages doctor appointments with day/week/month view toggles and allows accepting, cancelling, or completing appointments via the useUpdateDoctorAppointment mutation.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Provides a teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations and prescriptions.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Doctor dashboard overview showing today's appointments, pending prescriptions, daily earnings, and rating, with a personalized welcome using the logged-in doctor's profile.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Displays doctor earnings summary including total earnings, pending payments, and monthly earnings fetched via useDoctorEarnings, with an export statement button.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Renders the doctor Help & Support page with quick-link cards for training, compliance, and support tickets, an FAQ accordion, and a contact/support ticket form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Displays a searchable list of a doctor's patients fetched via the useDoctorPatients hook, showing patient details like name, gender, blood group, and relationship with loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Renders a tabbed doctor profile settings page with tabs for personal information, qualifications, availability, and notification/security settings.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Doctor consultation listing page with search, specialty accordion filter, and sort options (rating, fee, experience, availability) that filter and sort mock doctor data, navigating to individual doctor profiles on selection.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Specialty-specific doctor listing page that filters mock doctors by URL specialty param, supports search and sort options, and falls back to showing all doctors if no specialty match is found.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Health tools page featuring a symptom checker (with rule-based analysis and severity output) and a vitals tracker tab, using mock data for vital readings and health tips.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying quick service shortcuts, a 'Why Choose Us' section, and dynamically loaded health packages fetched via a React Query hook, with icon mapping to local image assets.
frontend/src/pages/HomeVisitTrackingPage: Displays a real-time home visit tracking page showing an animated doctor marker moving toward the patient on a map, with ETA countdown, status updates, in-app chat, and a call modal.
frontend/src/pages/OnlineConsultationPag: Renders a mock video consultation interface with mute/camera controls, in-session chat with auto doctor replies, file upload, and a prescription builder with preview/download.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Lists mock lab test orders with status badges and allows filtering by all/active/completed tabs, with navigation to individual order tracking and report download.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Shows a vertical timeline tracking the status of a lab test order (e.g., sample collected, processing, report ready) identified by a URL order ID parameter.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDetailsPage.ts: Collects patient details (type, name, age, gender, phone, symptoms, optional address for home visits, and file uploads) before proceeding to the payment page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Presents a payment page with fee breakdown (consultation, travel, GST, discount), multiple payment method options, and simulates payment processing before navigating to a confirmation or tracking page.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Displays the phlebotomist's assigned sample collections fetched via useSampleCollections, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test names, status badge, and a navigation button linking to Google Maps.
Shows a phlebotomist dashboard with four metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Displays a public-facing doctor profile page with details like ratings, consultation modes, availability, fees, and qualifications, fetched via mock data using the doctorId URL param.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Renders a list of mock lab test reports with order details, test names, and a download PDF button for each verified report.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Displays a detailed service information page (doctor consultation, medicine delivery, lab tests, diagnostics, etc.) based on a URL param, showing included services, target audience, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: Provides a diagnostic tests catalog with search, category filtering, cart management, and prescription upload functionality, supporting both individual tests and health packages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, fonts, and accordion keyframes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 33) for the Jeevan HealthCare at Home super app, documenting architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and a high-level summary of all implemented modules, roles, and tech stack decisions.
